error.message: Could not generate schema snapshot: Everspot repository does not exist at configured path
error.blocker: Repository must be cloned/available before schema extraction can run
error.impact: Model generation blocked until real schema snapshot is created
remediation_steps: 1. Clone or symlink Everspot repository to /Users/cashkalina/code/everspot-brain/everspot
2. Ensure Everspot is runnable: .env configured, composer install completed, tenant context configured
3. Create or identify a reference tenant for introspection
4. Run tenant database migrations: php artisan tenants:migrate
6. Generate snapshot via tenant context: php artisan tenants:run <tenant-id> --command="wiki:schema-snapshot tenant --output=/tmp/tenant.json"
tenant_context_notes: Tenant snapshot requires entering tenant context via stancl/tenancy
All tenants share one schema - any freshly migrated tenant is authoritative
Can use throwaway tenant if needed: create, migrate, extract, destroy
Alternatively set up permanent reference tenant for extractions

meta.generated_by: Phase 3 skeleton generator - awaiting real extraction

_notes: This is a SKELETON snapshot with error markers.
